title: Ibarraea avendanoi

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Ibarreaea avendanoi include essential oils, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Ibarreaea avendanoi is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are among the most common herbal preparations made with this plant.
